visual_description: Two men are seated inside a car, one leaning toward the other in close proximity. The man on the right, with dark hair and wearing a dark jacket, looks downward with his head slightly tilted. The man on the left, wearing a black shirt, leans in toward the other with his mouth slightly open, appearing to speak or react.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a low pitch with a slow pace, accompanied by heavy breathing and a sigh.
